title: Bit Digital Inc (BTBT) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Surging Revenue and Strategic Growth
text: Bit Digital achieved remarkable growth in 2024, with revenue increasing 141% to $108 million. The company reported adjusted EBITDA of $73 million and gross margins expanded to 42.3%, representing a 500 basis point improvement. GAAP earnings per share reached $0.19 for the year. The company's balance sheet strengthened considerably, with $98.9 million in cash and $161.4 million in digital assets as of December 31, 2024. The company's business diversified significantly during 2024. High-Performance Computing (HPC) revenue accounted for over 40% of full-year revenue and exceeded half of Q4 revenue. The new Cloud Services segment generated $45.7 million in its inaugural year, producing $13 million in Q4 alone positioning it as the company's largest revenue contributor. Bitcoin mining revenue reached $58.6 million, up 32% year-over-year, though its revenue contribution declined from 98% in 2023 to 54% in 2024. Management highlighted significant expansion opportunities. The cloud services run rate currently stands at $62 million, with projections to reach $87 million following GPU deployments. CEO Sam Tabar stated the company is already past $100 million on a contracted basis across GPU and data center businesses. The company invested $94 million in capital expenditures during 2024 and remains debt-free while pursuing non-dilutive financing alternatives.
